summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Hispaloshop homepage expansion, i18n translations, and header component updates. All 14 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI testing verified homepage with 20 categories, hero search with live suggestions, language switching (EN/ES/KO), and translation integration.

minor.issue: Limit parameter not strictly enforced - returns all products

critical_code_review_comments: SellerAIAssistant.js correctly uses useTranslation hook and getQuickPrompts(t) function
NotificationsBell receives t prop and uses t('notifications.*') keys properly
Cart preview in Header.js uses t('cart.*') translation keys
home.viewAllResults key present in all 3 locales (EN, ES, KO)
Desktop header correctly removes search icon - only mobile has search toggle
context_for_next_testing_agent: All homepage expansion and i18n features verified working. 20 categories scrollable, hero search with live suggestions, language switching EN/ES/KO works. NotificationsBell and cart preview use translation keys properly. SellerAIAssistant uses useTranslation hook. Stripe integration error on producer dashboard is expected (requires Stripe Connect setup).
